title: LS2 LS2 FF396 Tech Red

specs.material: Carbon Fiber Composite Shell with ABS Impact Liner

technical_analysis: The LS2 FF396 Tech Red utilizes a multi-density EPS liner system designed to absorb high-impact energy while maintaining structural integrity under rotational forces. The shell construction employs a carbon fiber composite weave over an ABS core, significantly reducing overall mass without compromising the rigidity required for ECE 22.06 compliance. This hybrid approach allows for a lighter helmet that reduces neck fatigue during long rides while offering superior protection against debris and impact.
marketing_description: Dominate the track or the street in style with the LS2 FF396 Tech Red, a full-face helmet engineered for performance enthusiasts who demand both safety and aesthetics. Its aggressive red livery features dynamic graphics that highlight its aerodynamic contours, while the lightweight carbon fiber shell ensures you stay agile at high speeds without sacrificing any protective capabilities.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the LS2 FF396 Tech Red full-face helmet. Lightweight carbon fiber shell, ECE 22.06 certified, and optimized for aerodynamics. Shop now for ultimate riding protection.
